prompt:
Vertical 4:5 portrait social-media poster, GTA Vice City aesthetic for the Muha Members Giveaway. TWO REFERENCE IMAGES: the FIRST is the locked TYPOGRAPHY / PALETTE / MUHA LOGO / LAYOUT anchor — reproduce its warm-cream stone-textured headline letters with reddish-orange tint and strong red glow halo, red banner subtitle, ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest, vertical center layout, all-red palette. The SECOND reference is the BACKGROUND COMPOSITION inspiration — an extreme low-angle ground-level shot of a red Dodge Challenger from behind/below the front wheel, with the massive black wheel rim dominating the lower portion of the frame, red bodywork curving up the side, red side mirror visible in the middle-distance, wet asphalt motion-blurred rushing past, dark night sky above.

VERTICAL LAYOUT: text-and-logo block VERTICALLY CENTERED. Muha crest near top-third mark, headline at vertical center, subtitle banner just below center. Lower portion shows the Challenger close-up.

PALETTE — LOCKED: dominant CRIMSON / SCARLET RED (#B81020 / #E0202C / #FF2F3F) with warm orange-red accents, deep black, wet-asphalt charcoal, warm gold accents on the Muha crest. ABSOLUTELY NO pink, NO magenta, NO teal, NO cyan, NO blue, NO purple. The sky above can be a deep midnight black with a subtle warm red-orange ambient glow on the horizon (no blue sky).

HEADER TYPOGRAPHY — match the first reference exactly:
  • Bold blocky sans-serif letterforms, thick uniform strokes (heavy GTA-style display face, NOT chrome, NOT silver).
  • Letter FACE: warm cream / pale peach with subtle reddish-orange tint, faint stone / concrete / weathered-marble TEXTURE — slightly grainy, organic.
  • Letter OUTLINE: thin dark maroon / dried-blood red.
  • GLOW: strong warm red-orange glow halo radiating from behind and beneath every letter.
  • DEPTH: 3D extruded shadow underneath each letter in deep maroon.
  • POSTURE: slight forward italic skew (~5-8°).
  • All caps, perfectly horizontally centered, two stacked lines: line 1 'SECURE', line 2 'THE BAG'. The phrase is exactly 'SECURE THE BAG'.

SUBTITLE: same red banner-bar styling as the first reference, all caps, perfectly horizontally centered directly below the headline, reading 'WIN THE GRAND PRIZE'. Red bar background, white-stroked text.

MUHA LOGO: ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest at top center, exact match to the first reference.

BACKGROUND — EXTREME LOW-ANGLE CHALLENGER WHEEL SHOT, ALL-RED PALETTE:
  • Camera at ground level, angled up and slightly behind the front wheel of a bright crimson red Dodge Challenger SRT.
  • The massive black alloy WHEEL RIM dominates the lower portion of the frame — large, glossy, aggressive, brake caliper just visible behind the spokes.
  • The red bodywork of the Challenger curves up and away from the wheel along the right side of the frame.
  • The red side mirror visible in the middle of the frame, catching ambient red light.
  • Wet rain-slicked black asphalt RUSHING PAST underneath with horizontal motion-blur streaks, suggesting the car is moving.
  • Dark midnight sky above with a subtle warm red-orange ambient glow on the horizon (no stars cluttering the frame, just deep black with faint distant lights).
  • A faint warm red glow underneath the car body suggesting underbody neon or the heat of the engine.
  • Composition matches the second reference's framing: wheel filling roughly 30-40% of the lower frame, car bodywork on the right, asphalt rushing past on the left.

Retain the first reference's grain / halation / cinematic finish. Sharp focus on headline, subtitle, Muha logo, and the wheel/bodywork; asphalt motion-blurred. Photorealistic editorial movie poster. No additional text beyond what's specified.
refImages: Muha Giveaway Redesigned/Approved/Get on the List.png
